infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: OmniLens AI uses the camera for on-device AI analysis. All processing is local - no images are uploaded or stored.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: OmniLens AI may access photos for analysis. Images are immediately deleted after processing and never uploaded.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: OmniLens AI uses the microphone for on-device voice commands. No audio is recorded or stored.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: OmniLens AI uses Face ID to secure your private vault.
